message:
supervision: budget-aware restarts, restart policies, compiled restart plans

Adds budget-driven restart gating (cost quota, time-to-deadline, poll quota),
RestartPolicy enum (OneForOne/OneForAll/RestForOne), escalation policies,
exponential/fixed backoff, restart history tracking, and CompiledSupervisor
restart plan generation with monotone severity. Includes 52 passing tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
